task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Company Directory with Search** (Level 6)

ARCHETYPE: directory_app. Shape: a searchable/filterable catalog of records — the CORE is the search endpoint, not CRUD. Users browse (read-only for the public) but only admins can add/edit. Include: GET /api/companies (lists all), GET /api/companies/search?q= (full-text search over name + industry fields), GET /api/companies/:id (single record). POST /api/companies exists for admin seeding but the star of the show is SEARCH.
final_source:
build for javascript backend

create a Companies table:
  name, required, min 1, max 200
  industry
  website
  description
  created_at_date, auto

when user calls GET /api/companies:
  send back all Companies

when user calls GET /api/companies/search with q:
  results = search Companies for q
  send back results

when user calls GET /api/companies/:id:
  send back the Company with this id

when user calls POST /api/companies sending company:
  saved = save company to Companies
  send back saved with status 201
